# Coolest Codex Apps

Repository: https://github.com/ArcQian-bit/codex-real-engineer-skills
Install: https://arcqian-bit.github.io/codex-real-engineer-skills/install-codex-real-engineer-skill.html

Coolest Codex Apps is a collection of 10 Codex skills for software engineering:
repo mapping, issue triage, PR review, security review, performance work,
release prep, docs sync, frontend polish, migrations, and the general
`real-engineer` workflow router.

The pack is inspired by public Claude Code and agent-skill community patterns
but written for Codex `SKILL.md` discovery and execution.
